Tests that geolocation override is cleared on session disconnect.

Get original geolocation data
Geolocation data: {
    code : 3
    message : Timeout expired
}

Set required geolocation override fields
Geolocation data: {
    accuracy : 1.23
    altitude : null
    altitudeAccuracy : null
    heading : null
    latitude : 56.83
    longitude : 60.63
    speed : null
}

Disconnect session
Geolocation data: {
    code : 3
    message : Timeout expired
}
